allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\AI_project\\TEST1"; python todo.py add "Claude Code 익히기" 2>&1; echo "exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(\(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\AI_project\\TEST1"; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; & "C:\\WINDOWS\\py.exe" todo.py add "Python 프로젝트 완성" | Out-Host; & "C:\\WINDOWS\\py.exe" todo.py add "README 작성" | Out-Host; & "C:\\WINDOWS\\py.exe" todo.py list | Out-Host)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\AI_project\\TEST1"; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; Write-Host "--- 전체 목록 ---"; & "C:\\WINDOWS\\py.exe" todo.py list | Out-Host; Write-Host "--- 미완료만 ---"; & "C:\\WINDOWS\\py.exe" todo.py list --filter undone | Out-Host; Write-Host "--- 완료만 ---"; & "C:\\WINDOWS\\py.exe" todo.py list --filter done | Out-Host)
